blocks.text: Bodo/Glimt at San Siro — Norway's greatest Champions League night
A 3-1 first-leg lead puts Bodo/Glimt in firm control at 21:00. No Norwegian club has ever reached the CL quarter-finals — tonight, history is within touching distance.
🎮 13:00 — rain (Håvard Nygaard) opens DraculaN Season 5: 100 Thieves vs MANA

blocks.label: ⚽ Wed — Champions League continues
items: 21:00 — AS Monaco vs Paris Saint-Germain (PSG lead 3-2, French derby on a knife-edge)
21:00 — Benfica vs Real Madrid (narrow Madrid advantage, Benfica need one goal)
18:45 — Borussia Dortmund vs Atalanta (Dortmund lead 2-0 on aggregate)
